_comment: Self-contained CSV-only TIRP pipeline config. Mirrors config_stroke.json (the SQL pipeline) but runs entirely off CSV with no database. Edit window/karmalego/project here; run.py wires all file paths automatically from the bundle location.

karmalego._concepts_note: Restricted 68-concept list = the stroke pipeline scope (config_stroke.json). Set to "*" to mine ALL concepts (reproduces the 30,722-pattern reference).

project._note: projects.csv maps 40144 -> Kb_ID 2700; concept definitions load from tak_entities/2700 (no DB).
